description: Catch-all zero-result response for any record_search against Norway, Marriages, 1660-1926 (collection 1468080) whose surname is NOT the collection's abbreviated 'Halsteinsdr' -- covers the original exact spelling ('Halsteinsdatter'), a given-name-only variant paired with the still-full surname, a principal-only search with no surname filter at all, or any other query shape. Models that varying the given name alone (already-fixed behavior) or restructuring the query without touching the surname's letters still fails to recover the record, forcing a deliberate surname-abbreviation attempt. Must be listed after record-search-urna-halsteinsdr-marriage-match.json in the test's mcp_fixtures array so the specific positive match is checked first.
